implementation: clean-room; no upstream imports or copied source
audited_behaviors: query source and destination are path[0] and path[-1]
directed association counts every ordered segment pair in each training route
KSD mask size is 100 and key_num is 1
DRP-TP is key_num=0 with wotp tie behavior
failed planning returns a partial route without truth repair
declared_adaptation: training-only global segment occurrence counts min-max normalized to [0,1] and replicated over 48 identical slots; fixed source/destination offsets 0.0/1.0; no query-time input
specification_precedence: published paper equations and experimental settings take precedence where the official release conflicts
release_conflicts: paper Eq. (6)-(9) uses a candidate ID embedding and 65->512->256 candidate MLP followed by a query/candidate dot product; release models/key_segs.py instead indexes a global classifier row, appends a four-dimensional cosine/popularity projection, and adds a candidate bias
paper uses exp(normalized importance) positive weights; release train_keyseg.py uses 10**normalized_importance
paper reports 300 epochs; release conf.py and train_keyseg.py default to 1000
